name: River Edge
description: The narrow meeting point between flowing water and vegetation.

name: Riffle
description: Shallow, fast-moving water over stones. Good for wagtails and aquatic insects.

name: Gravel Bar
description: Open stones and sand exposed by the river. Warm, dry, and insect-rich.

name: Shaded Bank
description: Overhanging branches above slow water. A good perch for kingfishers.

name: Backwater
description: Slow, sheltered water behind the main current. A small refuge for insects and amphibians.

name: Woodland Edge
description: A transition between paths, trees, and the river corridor.
